// STEP 0 — DO NOT use Edit Class (whole-class compile fails on coroutine stubs).
// Use Assembly Editor → Edit Type on cnMissionManager → add these 4 private fields:

bForceCompleteChain            (type: System.Boolean)
m_iForceCompleteChainDepth     (type: System.Int32)
m_iForceCompletePendingTaskId  (type: System.Int32)
m_iForceCompleteRetryCount     (type: System.Int32)

// Landmark only (do not edit this line): private NpcTableScript NpcTable;
